cases.description: Coverage percentage request triggers full analysis
expectations: Detects the test framework and coverage tool in use
Reports coverage percentage by file or module

cases.description: Uncovered code identification triggers the skill
cases.prompt: show me which functions have no test coverage
expectations: Runs coverage analysis to generate a report
Lists functions or branches with zero coverage
Identifies files with coverage below a threshold

cases.description: Coverage report creation triggers the skill
cases.prompt: generate a test coverage report before we merge this PR
expectations: Outputs a summary with covered and uncovered line counts
Flags any new code introduced by the PR that is untested

cases.description: Writing new tests should trigger tdd, not test-coverage
cases.prompt: write tests for the UserService class
expectations: Does NOT invoke the test-coverage skill
Does NOT generate a coverage report

cases.description: Running tests should trigger test-run, not test-coverage
cases.prompt: run the test suite and tell me what failed
expectations: Does NOT invoke the test-coverage skill
Does NOT produce a coverage analysis report
